tools.name: list_build_milestones
tools.title: List Build List milestones
tools.description: List the signed-in user's Build List milestones (active tasks) with completion status. Use this to see what fatherhood-prep tasks are active or completed.

only_incomplete.description: If true, return only milestones not yet completed.

tools.name: get_readiness_summary
tools.title: Get Readiness score
tools.description: Return the signed-in user's most recent Father Readiness assessment: total score, category scores, and weakest category.

tools.name: get_current_program_week
tools.title: Get current training program week
tools.description: Return the signed-in user's active live-schedule training program (Forge or Rebuild) and the currently unlocked week.
